nodes.name: Hermes Authenticate
nodes.notes: POST /api/authenticate {username,password} -> { access_token }. Creds from n8n ENV (HERMES_BASE_URL / HERMES_USERNAME / HERMES_PASSWORD).

nodes.name: Hermes POST Catalogue
nodes.notes: POST /api/productsCatalogue { items:[...] }. 200 ok / 401 bad token / 422 processing error {msg,error}. Inserts new EANs; existing EANs are ignored by Hermes.
